prompts: A tiny chibi scientist character standing at a fork in a forest path, one path labeled with a large glowing steak, the other leading into a misty, ancient forest radiating a soft golden light. The character stares ahead with wide curious eyes and a furrowed brow, caught between two worlds. Twilight forest setting, dappled amber lantern light filtering through dark canopy. A subtle molecular chain floats in the air like vines. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: forest green, slate grey, warm amber. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the misty path ahead. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi laboratory scene: a small character sits inside a giant cell cross-section, examining a glowing dial labeled mTOR with a magnifying glass. The dial is turned down low. Small DNA double helices around the cell pulse with warm golden light, repairing themselves. The cell interior is richly detailed — ribosomes like tiny boulders, mitochondria like glowing lanterns. Night lab setting with cool blue-grey ambient light punctuated by golden repair glows. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: deep teal, slate blue, gold. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on glowing DNA helices. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi character slumped at a long feast table overloaded with protein sources — grilled meats, eggs, shakes in tall glasses — all slightly decayed or wilting. The character looks bloated and exhausted, holding their head in their hands. Above them, a giant glowing mTOR gear mechanism spins relentlessly, grinding down and throwing off sparks. Dim, slightly oppressive candlelit tavern setting. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: burnt sienna, earthy brown, dull red. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. No warm glow — slightly cold, flat ambient light. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi character standing at the center of a luminous circular autophagy cycle — illustrated as a clockwork mandala of tiny cellular cleaners sweeping debris. The character smiles gently, arms slightly raised, bathed in a warm amber and gold glow emanating from the center of the cycle. The background shows a simplified human silhouette with a glowing, healthy cell interior. Calm dawn setting — soft pinks and greens on the horizon. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, sage green, ivory. A chibi character in a simple kitchen setting, confidently building a single meal plate: fresh vegetables, fruits, a small bowl of grains — peaceful and minimal. The character holds one finger up as if counting a single rule, with a calm determined expression. A small calendar on the wall has one day circled with a subtle golden mark. Morning light streams in from a small window. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. A chibi character standing at the edge of a glowing forest path at dusk, gesturing warmly with one hand toward the viewer in a welcoming wave. Behind them, a cozy illuminated signpost points deeper into the forest — toward more discoveries. Fireflies drift around the character. The atmosphere is warm, inviting, slightly magical.
